signals.reasoning: BTC still has the strongest raw long structure on the board with negative funding and trend-supported price/OI, but the live PPI-driven breakout headline pushes this into a classic VETO no-chase setup. The edge here is real, but the timing quality for a fresh entry is no longer good enough.
ETH still has supportive negative funding, but price/OI remains short-covering-rally rather than clean continuation and the event-driven move is already extended. Under VETO it stays watch-only.
SOL remains constructive and trend-supported, but the fresh macro headline makes it a lower-quality follow-on long than it looked before the event spike. Not a fresh entry here.
STBL is too crowded and too extended, with positive funding, high OI-to-volume, and elevated overcrowding. It is dangerous to chase and still not clean enough to short into active momentum.
BLAST is improving but still lacks enough reliable structure to trust as a fresh signal, especially during a macro-driven headline burst. Watch-only.
PROMPT is extremely OI-heavy with positive funding and elevated squeeze risk, which makes it too unstable to touch under a live event brake. Best left alone.
AZTEC is still too fresh and too execution-sensitive to trust during a headline-driven move. Hold only.
SCR has a decent bounce but still lacks enough depth and structure to justify a fresh signal under VETO. Watch-only.
PEOPLE is stabilizing but still looks like general rebound participation rather than a differentiated leader. Not strong enough to act on here.
FARTCOIN is active and trend-supported, but the move is already too extended and too headline-sensitive for a clean fresh long. Also not a clean short while momentum is still positive.
TST remains far too extended with positive funding and elevated squeeze risk after the run. Too late to chase and too strong to fade cleanly here.
